summary.original: Search Open Library works and authors, fetch editions, browse subjects, resolve cover URLs, and read work/author resource templates without credentials.
summary.zhCN: 无需凭据即可检索 Open Library 作品与作者、读取版本、浏览主题、生成封面 URL，并读取作品/作者资源模板。

description.original: The official 0.1.18 STDIO package exposes nine read-only MCP tools and two resource templates against Open Library. Agent-OPT keeps that real protocol surface while fixing outbound access to https://openlibrary.org specified paths, accepting only a validated deployment HTTPS_PROXY at process startup and removing it from the visible upstream environment, rejecting redirects and caller-selected hosts, narrowing pagination, and presenting bibliographic text as untrusted evidence.
description.zhCN: 官方 0.1.18 STDIO 包提供九个只读 MCP 工具和两个资源模板，对接 Open Library。Agent-OPT 保留这套真实协议能力，同时把出站访问固定为 https://openlibrary.org 指定路径，在清除凭据后仅重放已校验的部署 HTTPS_PROXY，拒绝重定向与调用方自选主机，收紧分页，并把书目文本作为不受信任的证据呈现。

evidence.note: npm records 0.1.18 as Apache-2.0 with Node >=24, integrity sha512-rOeddSNOm9aI+YAAhRrMk10CHKzgm8x3e/iJ6NLOxhwcHhbZcksspmbcTQOeYWmXNKqFv1dyvRAB3hkQI0AZug==, and no gitHead. Agent-OPT therefore does not claim SLSA provenance from the registry alone.
Upstream README documents 9 tools and 2 resources for Open Library search, works, editions, authors, subjects, and covers.

Real STDIO qualification through the fixed bootstrap returned OL27482W for The Hobbit, work/author/subject/cover tools, and openlibrary://works/OL27482W resource text. Upstream error structuredContent may violate success output schemas and is recorded as a controlled failure.

license.evidence: The published npm artifact declares Apache-2.0. Agent-OPT invokes the upstream package and adds an independent adapter, bootstrap, tests, and Web presentation without copying its implementation.

description.original: Full-text and field-filtered work search with bounded pagination.
description.zhCN: 全文与字段过滤的作品检索，分页有界。

description.original: Fetch work, edition, author, author-works, and subject records by Open Library identifiers.
description.zhCN: 按 Open Library 标识读取作品、版本、作者、作者作品与主题记录。

description.original: Construct fixed covers.openlibrary.org URLs without proxying image bytes.
description.zhCN: 生成固定 covers.openlibrary.org URL，不代抓图片字节。

description.original: Read openlibrary-work and openlibrary-author MCP resource templates for injectable catalog context.
description.zhCN: 读取 openlibrary-work 与 openlibrary-author MCP 资源模板，作为可注入的书目上下文。

notes: The adapter launches only the exact local 0.1.18 Node entry through a fixed STDIO bootstrap with a 256 MiB old-space limit; callers cannot choose commands, arguments, environment variables, transport, or working directories.

The bootstrap permits only HTTPS GET requests to https://openlibrary.org on fixed search, works, books, authors, subjects, isbn, and /api/books paths. It rejects custom ports, credentials, fragments, credential headers, Request objects, other origins or paths, and all redirects.
Cover tools only construct https://covers.openlibrary.org URLs; the bootstrap does not fetch cover image bytes on behalf of callers.

A deployment-level HTTPS_PROXY is optional for controlled egress. The adapter validates a credential-free http/https origin and passes it only at process startup; Node initializes the proxy dispatcher before the bootstrap removes visible proxy variables and other credentials.

Package, cloud, model-provider, telemetry-exporter, HTTP-server, auth, and custom Open Library endpoint variables are removed. Direct HTTP(S), raw sockets, arbitrary DNS APIs, datagrams, WebSockets, worker threads, and subprocess APIs are denied outside the authorized fetch scope.
Web input is limited to validated queries, OL identifiers, subjects, cover identifiers, and resource URIs. Host, URL, path, credential, command, and arbitrary request options are unavailable.
Bibliographic titles, descriptions, bios, and notes are untrusted remote data. The dedicated Web renders them as escaped React text and never executes Markdown, raw HTML, links, or commands.

requirements: The exact @cyanheads/openlibrary-mcp-server 0.1.18 package installed from package-lock.json
Outbound TLS access to the fixed https://openlibrary.org origin for catalog queries
Optional deployment egress through a host-configured, credential-free HTTPS_PROXY origin; callers cannot configure the proxy
No API key, credential, paid plan, external account, or remote MCP host is required

description.original: The bootstrap fixes origin, paths, methods, redirect mode, and response sizes; none are caller-selectable.
description.zhCN: 启动引导固定来源、路径、方法、重定向模式和响应大小；调用方不能选择这些参数。

description.original: Web requests contain only validated search fields, OL identifiers, subjects, cover identifiers, or resource URIs.
description.zhCN: Web 请求只包含校验后的检索字段、OL 标识、主题、封面标识或资源 URI。

description.original: A credential-free http/https HTTPS_PROXY origin may be inherited from the deployment; the Web API cannot set it.
description.zhCN: 部署可继承一个无凭据的 http/https HTTPS_PROXY 来源；Web API 不能设置它。

notes: The integration answers a common bibliographic research need without credentials and preserves exact OL IDs for deeper investigation.
Official package identity and Apache-2.0 are clear, but the absent npm gitHead/provenance attestation is reflected in the provenance score.

Qualification against the published tarball discovered exactly nine tools and two resource templates. Real calls returned The Hobbit (OL27482W), Tolkien author data, science-fiction subjects, and fixed cover URLs.
Upstream not-found or network error structuredContent may violate the declared success output schema; Agent-OPT records that as a controlled failure instead of treating it as success.
Open Library data can be incomplete or delayed. The Web adaptation does not claim completeness of the global catalog.
Kept Open Library, MCP, STDIO, OL Work/Author/Edition IDs, ISBN, OCLC, LCCN as established technical terms.
Chinese copy distinguishes catalog evidence from a completeness guarantee.
The deployment proxy is validated before process launch and removed from the visible environment before the upstream package is imported.

features: GPT-flavored work search with The Hobbit example
work detail, author lookup/search, subject browse, and cover URL generation
MCP resource template reader for work and author URIs
pending, activity, upstream error, local validation, empty and responsive feedback
fixed openlibrary.org and no-catalog-completeness boundary notice
dedicatedElements: result cards for works and authors

tests.evidence: The installed 0.1.18 STDIO server exposed exactly nine tools and two resource templates (openlibrary-work, openlibrary-author). Real openlibrary_search_books for The Hobbit returned OL27482W; openlibrary_get_work returned the Hobbit work title; openlibrary_get_cover_url returned https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/14627509-M.jpg.

Representative Hobbit path: search → work OL27482W → openlibrary://works/OL27482W resource text → openlibrary_get_subject science fiction with bounded works. Cover URL generation used fixed covers.openlibrary.org host.

Adapter rejected invalid work IDs, path-traversal author IDs, oversized limits, caller-selected hosts, unsafe cover identifiers, and non-openlibrary resource URIs before launch. Credential-bearing HTTPS_PROXY values are rejected by validatedOpenLibraryProxy.

Security probe with AGENT_OPT_OPENLIBRARY_SECURITY_PROBE=1 asserted fixedOriginAccepted, redirectForced, customHostDenied, customPathDenied, credentialHeaderDenied, httpDenied, subprocessDenied, proxyRemoved, and credentialRemoved. The real nine-tool network chain passed after visible proxy variables were removed; credential-bearing proxies are denied.
Public Next route ran real search (OL27482W), work detail, and openlibrary://works/OL27482W resource read. Caller-selected baseUrl was rejected with HTTP 400.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=openlibrary.spec.ts › @web-e2e [openlibrary-research-desk] OpenLibrary Web runs nine tools, two resources, errors, and responsive layout; route=/plugins/openlibrary-research-desk; result=passed
